ffmpeg_decoder.c(3) Library Functions Manual ffmpeg_decoder.c(3)

NAME

ffmpeg_decoder.c - FFmpeg-based media decoder implementation.

SYNOPSIS

Data Structures


struct ffmpeg_decoder_t
FFmpeg decoder state for video and audio decoding. struct stdin_buffer_t
struct stdin_buffer_reader_t

Macros


#define TARGET_SAMPLE_RATE 48000
#define TARGET_CHANNELS 1
#define AVIO_BUFFER_SIZE (64 * 1024)

Functions


ffmpeg_decoder_t * ffmpeg_decoder_create (const char *path)
ffmpeg_decoder_t * ffmpeg_decoder_create_stdin (void)
void ffmpeg_decoder_destroy (ffmpeg_decoder_t *decoder)
image_t * ffmpeg_decoder_read_video_frame (ffmpeg_decoder_t *decoder)
asciichat_error_t ffmpeg_decoder_start_prefetch (ffmpeg_decoder_t *decoder)
Start the background frame prefetching thread. void ffmpeg_decoder_stop_prefetch (ffmpeg_decoder_t *decoder)
Stop the background frame prefetching thread. void ffmpeg_decoder_set_exit_callback (ffmpeg_decoder_t *decoder, bool(*should_exit_callback)(void *), void *user_data)
bool ffmpeg_decoder_is_prefetch_running (ffmpeg_decoder_t *decoder)
bool ffmpeg_decoder_has_video (ffmpeg_decoder_t *decoder)
asciichat_error_t ffmpeg_decoder_get_video_dimensions (ffmpeg_decoder_t *decoder, int *width, int *height)
double ffmpeg_decoder_get_video_fps (ffmpeg_decoder_t *decoder)
size_t ffmpeg_decoder_read_audio_samples (ffmpeg_decoder_t *decoder, float *buffer, size_t num_samples)
bool ffmpeg_decoder_has_audio (ffmpeg_decoder_t *decoder)
asciichat_error_t ffmpeg_decoder_rewind (ffmpeg_decoder_t *decoder)
asciichat_error_t ffmpeg_decoder_seek_to_timestamp (ffmpeg_decoder_t *decoder, double timestamp_sec)
bool ffmpeg_decoder_at_end (ffmpeg_decoder_t *decoder)
double ffmpeg_decoder_get_duration (ffmpeg_decoder_t *decoder)
double ffmpeg_decoder_get_position (ffmpeg_decoder_t *decoder)

Detailed Description

FFmpeg-based media decoder implementation.

Definition in file ffmpeg_decoder.c.

Macro Definition Documentation

#define AVIO_BUFFER_SIZE (64 * 1024)

AVIO buffer size for stdin reading (64KB)

Definition at line 56 of file ffmpeg_decoder.c.

Referenced by ffmpeg_decoder_create_stdin().

#define TARGET_CHANNELS 1

Target audio channels (mono)

Definition at line 53 of file ffmpeg_decoder.c.

#define TARGET_SAMPLE_RATE 48000

Target audio sample rate (48kHz for Opus compatibility)

Definition at line 50 of file ffmpeg_decoder.c.

Referenced by ffmpeg_decoder_create(), and ffmpeg_decoder_create_stdin().

Function Documentation

bool ffmpeg_decoder_at_end (ffmpeg_decoder_t * decoder)

Definition at line 1544 of file ffmpeg_decoder.c.

1544                                                       {
1545   return decoder && decoder->eof_reached;
1546 }




References ffmpeg_decoder_t::eof_reached.


Referenced by media_source_at_end(),
    media_source_read_audio(), and media_source_read_video().






ffmpeg_decoder_t * ffmpeg_decoder_create (const char *
  path)


Definition at line 588 of file ffmpeg_decoder.c.


588                                                           {
589   if (!path) {
590     SET_ERRNO(ERROR_INVALID_PARAM, "Path is NULL");
591     return NULL;
592   }
593 
594   // Suppress FFmpeg's verbose debug logging (H.264 codec warnings, etc.)
595   // Only set this once, it's a global setting
596   static bool ffmpeg_log_level_set = false;
597   if (!ffmpeg_log_level_set) {
598     av_log_set_level(AV_LOG_QUIET);                  // Suppress all FFmpeg logging
599     av_log_set_callback(ffmpeg_silent_log_callback); // Install silent callback to discard all output
600     ffmpeg_log_level_set = true;
601   }
602 
603   ffmpeg_decoder_t *decoder = SAFE_MALLOC(sizeof(ffmpeg_decoder_t), ffmpeg_decoder_t *);
604   if (!decoder) {
605     SET_ERRNO(ERROR_MEMORY, "Failed to allocate decoder");
606     return NULL;
607   }
608 
609   memset(decoder, 0, sizeof(*decoder));
610   decoder->video_stream_idx = -1;
611   decoder->audio_stream_idx = -1;
612   decoder->last_video_pts = -1.0;
613   decoder->last_audio_pts = -1.0;
614 
615   // Capture FFmpeg's probing output (FFmpeg may write directly to either stream)
616   int ret = 0;
617   LOG_IO("ffmpeg", {
618     // Configure FFmpeg options for HTTP streaming performance
619     AVDictionary *options = NULL;
620 
621     // For HTTP/HTTPS streams: enable fast probing and reconnection (validated via production-grade URL regex)
622     if (path && url_is_valid(path)) {
623       // Limit probing to 32KB for faster format detection
624       av_dict_set(&options, "probesize", "32768", 0);
625       // Analyze for 100ms max to determine streams quickly
626       av_dict_set(&options, "analyzeduration", "100000", 0);
627       // Enable auto-reconnection for interrupted connections
628       av_dict_set(&options, "reconnect", "1", 0);
629       // Allow reconnection for streamed protocols
630       av_dict_set(&options, "reconnect_streamed", "1", 0);
631       // Set reasonable I/O timeout (10 seconds)
632       av_dict_set(&options, "rw_timeout", "10000000", 0);
633       // Enable HTTP persistent connection (keep-alive) for better performance
634       av_dict_set(&options, "http_persistent", "1", 0);
635       // Reduce connect timeout to fail faster if server is unreachable
636       av_dict_set(&options, "connect_timeout", "5000000", 0);
637     }
638 
639     // Open input file
640     ret = avformat_open_input(&decoder->format_ctx, path, NULL, &options);
641     av_dict_free(&options); // Free options dictionary
642 
643     if (ret >= 0) {
644       // Find stream info
645       if (avformat_find_stream_info(decoder->format_ctx, NULL) < 0) {
646         ret = -1;
647       }
648     }
649   });
650 
651   if (ret < 0) {
652     if (ret == -1) {
653       SET_ERRNO(ERROR_MEDIA_DECODE, "Failed to find stream info");
654     } else {
655       SET_ERRNO(ERROR_MEDIA_OPEN, "Failed to open media file: %s", path);
656     }
657     if (decoder->format_ctx) {
658       avformat_close_input(&decoder->format_ctx);
659     }
660     SAFE_FREE(decoder);
661     return NULL;
662   }
663 
664   // Install interrupt callback to allow seeking to interrupt long av_read_frame() calls
665   // Do this AFTER finding stream info to ensure format context is fully initialized
666   if (decoder->format_ctx) {
667     decoder->format_ctx->interrupt_callback.callback = ffmpeg_interrupt_callback;
668     decoder->format_ctx->interrupt_callback.opaque = decoder;
669   }
670 
671   // Open video codec
672   asciichat_error_t err = open_codec_context(decoder->format_ctx, AVMEDIA_TYPE_VIDEO, &decoder->video_stream_idx,
673                                              &decoder->video_codec_ctx);
674   if (err != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
675     log_warn("Failed to open video codec (file may be audio-only)");
676   }
677 
678   // Open audio codec - audio is enabled by default (no option needed)
679   // Always try to open audio codec, don't rely on GET_OPTION(audio_enabled) which has a default issue
680   err = open_codec_context(decoder->format_ctx, AVMEDIA_TYPE_AUDIO, &decoder->audio_stream_idx,
681                            &decoder->audio_codec_ctx);
682   if (err != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
683     log_debug("No audio codec found (file may be video-only or audio codec not available)");
684     decoder->audio_stream_idx = -1;
685     decoder->audio_codec_ctx = NULL;
686   }
687 
688   // Require at least one stream
689   if (decoder->video_stream_idx < 0 && decoder->audio_stream_idx < 0) {
690     SET_ERRNO(ERROR_MEDIA_DECODE, "No video or audio streams found");
691     ffmpeg_decoder_destroy(decoder);
692     return NULL;
693   }
694 
695   // Allocate frame and packet
696   decoder->frame = av_frame_alloc();
697   decoder->packet = av_packet_alloc();
698   if (!decoder->frame || !decoder->packet) {
699     SET_ERRNO(ERROR_MEMORY, "Failed to allocate frame/packet");
700     ffmpeg_decoder_destroy(decoder);
701     return NULL;
702   }
703 
704   // Initialize swscale context for video if present
705   if (decoder->video_codec_ctx) {
706     // Validate codec context has valid dimensions and pixel format
707     // For HTTP streams, these might not be valid until first frame is read
708     if (decoder->video_codec_ctx->width <= 0 || decoder->video_codec_ctx->height <= 0) {
709       log_warn("Video codec has invalid dimensions (%dx%d), will initialize swscale on first frame",
710                decoder->video_codec_ctx->width, decoder->video_codec_ctx->height);
711       // Don't create swscale context yet - will create it lazily on first frame read
712     } else if (decoder->video_codec_ctx->pix_fmt == AV_PIX_FMT_NONE) {
713       log_warn("Video codec has invalid pixel format, will initialize swscale on first frame");
714       // Don't create swscale context yet - will create it lazily on first frame read
715     } else {
716       // Create swscale context with valid parameters
717       decoder->sws_ctx =
718           sws_getContext(decoder->video_codec_ctx->width, decoder->video_codec_ctx->height,
719                          decoder->video_codec_ctx->pix_fmt, decoder->video_codec_ctx->width,
720                          decoder->video_codec_ctx->height, AV_PIX_FMT_RGB24, SWS_BILINEAR, NULL, NULL, NULL);
721       if (!decoder->sws_ctx) {
722         SET_ERRNO(ERROR_MEDIA_DECODE, "Failed to create swscale context");
723         ffmpeg_decoder_destroy(decoder);
724         return NULL;
725       }
726     }
727   }
728 
729   // Initialize swresample context for audio if present
730   if (decoder->audio_codec_ctx) {
731     // Store output sample rate for position tracking
732     decoder->audio_sample_rate = TARGET_SAMPLE_RATE;
733 
734     // Allocate resampler context
735     decoder->swr_ctx = swr_alloc();
736     if (!decoder->swr_ctx) {
737       SET_ERRNO(ERROR_MEMORY, "Failed to allocate swresample context");
738       ffmpeg_decoder_destroy(decoder);
739       return NULL;
740     }
741 
742     // Set options
743     av_opt_set_chlayout(decoder->swr_ctx, "in_chlayout", &decoder->audio_codec_ctx->ch_layout, 0);
744     av_opt_set_int(decoder->swr_ctx, "in_sample_rate", decoder->audio_codec_ctx->sample_rate, 0);
745     av_opt_set_sample_fmt(decoder->swr_ctx, "in_sample_fmt", decoder->audio_codec_ctx->sample_fmt, 0);
746 
747     AVChannelLayout out_ch_layout = AV_CHANNEL_LAYOUT_MONO;
748     av_opt_set_chlayout(decoder->swr_ctx, "out_chlayout", &out_ch_layout, 0);
749     av_opt_set_int(decoder->swr_ctx, "out_sample_rate", TARGET_SAMPLE_RATE, 0);
750     av_opt_set_sample_fmt(decoder->swr_ctx, "out_sample_fmt", AV_SAMPLE_FMT_FLT, 0);
751 
752     // Initialize
753     if (swr_init(decoder->swr_ctx) < 0) {
754       SET_ERRNO(ERROR_MEDIA_DECODE, "Failed to initialize swresample context");
755       ffmpeg_decoder_destroy(decoder);
756       return NULL;
757     }
758 
759     // Allocate audio buffer (10 seconds worth)
760     decoder->audio_buffer_size = TARGET_SAMPLE_RATE * 10;
761     decoder->audio_buffer = SAFE_MALLOC(decoder->audio_buffer_size * sizeof(float), float *);
762     if (!decoder->audio_buffer) {
763       SET_ERRNO(ERROR_MEMORY, "Failed to allocate audio buffer");
764       ffmpeg_decoder_destroy(decoder);
765       return NULL;
766     }
767   }
768 
769   // Initialize video frame prefetching system (for YouTube streaming)
770   if (decoder->video_stream_idx >= 0) {
771     int width = decoder->video_codec_ctx->width;
772     int height = decoder->video_codec_ctx->height;
773 
774     // Create two prefetch image buffers for double-buffering
775     decoder->prefetch_image_a = image_new((size_t)width, (size_t)height);
776     decoder->prefetch_image_b = image_new((size_t)width, (size_t)height);
777     if (!decoder->prefetch_image_a || !decoder->prefetch_image_b) {
778       SET_ERRNO(ERROR_MEMORY, "Failed to allocate prefetch image buffers");
779       ffmpeg_decoder_destroy(decoder);
780       return NULL;
781     }
782 
783     decoder->current_prefetch_image = decoder->prefetch_image_a;
784     decoder->prefetch_frame_ready = false;
785 
786     // Initialize prefetch mutex
787     if (mutex_init(&decoder->prefetch_mutex, "ffmpeg_prefetch") != 0) {
788       SET_ERRNO(ERROR_MEMORY, "Failed to initialize prefetch mutex");
789       ffmpeg_decoder_destroy(decoder);
790       return NULL;
791     }
792 
793     if (cond_init(&decoder->prefetch_cond, "ffmpeg_prefetch") != 0) {
794       SET_ERRNO(ERROR_MEMORY, "Failed to initialize prefetch condition variable");
795       mutex_destroy(&decoder->prefetch_mutex);
796       ffmpeg_decoder_destroy(decoder);
797       return NULL;
798     }
799 
800     if (mutex_init(&decoder->read_frame_mutex, "ffmpeg_read_frame") != 0) {
801       SET_ERRNO(ERROR_MEMORY, "Failed to initialize read_frame mutex");
802       mutex_destroy(&decoder->prefetch_mutex);
803       cond_destroy(&decoder->prefetch_cond);
804       ffmpeg_decoder_destroy(decoder);
805       return NULL;
806     }
807 
808     decoder->prefetch_thread_running = false;
809     decoder->prefetch_should_stop = false;
810   }
811 
812   log_debug("FFmpeg decoder opened: %s (video=%s, audio=%s)", path, decoder->video_stream_idx >= 0 ? "yes" : "no",
813             decoder->audio_stream_idx >= 0 ? "yes" : "no");
814 
815   char decoder_name[256];
816   snprintf(decoder_name, sizeof(decoder_name), "%s", path);
817   NAMED_REGISTER_FFMPEG_DECODER(decoder, decoder_name, NULL);
818 
819   return decoder;
820 }

    ffmpeg_decoder_t::audio_buffer_size,
    ffmpeg_decoder_t::audio_codec_ctx,
    ffmpeg_decoder_t::audio_sample_rate,
    ffmpeg_decoder_t::audio_stream_idx,
    ffmpeg_decoder_t::current_prefetch_image,

    ffmpeg_decoder_t::prefetch_frame_ready,
    ffmpeg_decoder_t::prefetch_image_a,
    ffmpeg_decoder_t::prefetch_image_b,
    ffmpeg_decoder_t::prefetch_mutex,
    ffmpeg_decoder_t::prefetch_should_stop,
    ffmpeg_decoder_t::prefetch_thread_running,

    ffmpeg_decoder_t::sws_ctx, TARGET_SAMPLE_RATE,

ffmpeg_decoder_t * ffmpeg_decoder_create_stdin (void
  )


Definition at line 822 of file ffmpeg_decoder.c.


822                                                     {
823   // Buffer entire stdin on first call (shared between video and audio decoders)
824   if (!g_stdin_buffer) {
825     log_debug("Reading stdin into buffer...");
826     g_stdin_buffer = stdin_buffer_read_all();
827     if (!g_stdin_buffer) {
828       SET_ERRNO(ERROR_MEDIA_OPEN, "Failed to read stdin into buffer");
829       return NULL;
830     }
831   }
832 
833   ffmpeg_decoder_t *decoder = SAFE_MALLOC(sizeof(ffmpeg_decoder_t), ffmpeg_decoder_t *);
834   if (!decoder) {
835     SET_ERRNO(ERROR_MEMORY, "Failed to allocate decoder");
836     return NULL;
837   }
838 
839   memset(decoder, 0, sizeof(*decoder));
840   decoder->video_stream_idx = -1;
841   decoder->audio_stream_idx = -1;
842   decoder->is_stdin = true;
843   decoder->last_video_pts = -1.0;
844   decoder->last_audio_pts = -1.0;
845 
846   // Create per-decoder reader (each decoder gets independent position tracking)
847   stdin_buffer_reader_t *reader = SAFE_MALLOC(sizeof(stdin_buffer_reader_t), stdin_buffer_reader_t *);
848   if (!reader) {
849     SET_ERRNO(ERROR_MEMORY, "Failed to allocate buffer reader");
850     SAFE_FREE(decoder);
851     return NULL;
852   }
853   reader->buffer = g_stdin_buffer;
854   reader->pos = 0;  // Each decoder starts from position 0
855 
856   // Allocate a small internal buffer for AVIO (required by avio_alloc_context)
857   decoder->avio_buffer = SAFE_MALLOC(AVIO_BUFFER_SIZE, unsigned char *);
858   if (!decoder->avio_buffer) {
859     SET_ERRNO(ERROR_MEMORY, "Failed to allocate AVIO buffer");
860     SAFE_FREE(reader);
861     SAFE_FREE(decoder);
862     return NULL;
863   }
864 
865   decoder->avio_ctx = avio_alloc_context(decoder->avio_buffer,  // internal buffer for AVIO
866                                          AVIO_BUFFER_SIZE,       // buffer size
867                                          0,                      // write_flag
868                                          reader,                 // opaque (per-decoder reader)
869                                          memory_read_packet,
870                                          NULL,                   // write_packet
871                                          memory_seek_packet      // seek (memory is seekable)
872   );
873 
874   if (!decoder->avio_ctx) {
875     SET_ERRNO(ERROR_MEMORY, "Failed to create AVIO context");
876     SAFE_FREE(decoder->avio_buffer);
877     SAFE_FREE(decoder);
878     return NULL;
879   }
880 
881   // Mark AVIO context as seekable (memory buffer supports seeking)
882   decoder->avio_ctx->seekable = AVIO_SEEKABLE_NORMAL;
883 
884   // Allocate format context
885   decoder->format_ctx = avformat_alloc_context();
886   if (!decoder->format_ctx) {
887     SET_ERRNO(ERROR_MEMORY, "Failed to allocate format context");
888     av_freep(&decoder->avio_ctx->buffer);
889     avio_context_free(&decoder->avio_ctx);
890     SAFE_FREE(decoder);
891     return NULL;
892   }
893 
894   decoder->format_ctx->pb = decoder->avio_ctx;
895   decoder->format_ctx->flags |= AVFMT_FLAG_CUSTOM_IO; // Tell FFmpeg to use our custom AVIO context
896 
897   // Capture FFmpeg's probing output
898   int ret = 0;
899   LOG_IO("ffmpeg", {
900     // Open input from buffered stdin
901     ret = avformat_open_input(&decoder->format_ctx, NULL, NULL, NULL);
902     if (ret >= 0) {
903       // Find stream info
904       if (avformat_find_stream_info(decoder->format_ctx, NULL) < 0) {
905         ret = -1;
906       }
907     }
908   });
909 
910   if (ret < 0) {
911     if (ret == -1) {
912       SET_ERRNO(ERROR_MEDIA_DECODE, "Failed to find stream info from stdin buffer");
913     } else {
914       SET_ERRNO(ERROR_MEDIA_OPEN, "Failed to open stdin buffer");
915     }
916     av_freep(&decoder->avio_ctx->buffer);
917     avio_context_free(&decoder->avio_ctx);
918     if (decoder->format_ctx) {
919       avformat_free_context(decoder->format_ctx);
920     }
921     SAFE_FREE(decoder);
922     return NULL;
923   }
924 
925   // Open codecs (same as file-based decoder)
926   asciichat_error_t err = open_codec_context(decoder->format_ctx, AVMEDIA_TYPE_VIDEO, &decoder->video_stream_idx,
927                                              &decoder->video_codec_ctx);
928   if (err != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
929     log_warn("Failed to open video codec from stdin");
930   }
931 
932   if (GET_OPTION(audio_enabled)) {
933     err = open_codec_context(decoder->format_ctx, AVMEDIA_TYPE_AUDIO, &decoder->audio_stream_idx,
934                              &decoder->audio_codec_ctx);
935     if (err != ASCIICHAT_OK) {
936       log_warn("Failed to open audio codec from stdin");
937     }
938   } else {
939     decoder->audio_stream_idx = -1;
940     decoder->audio_codec_ctx = NULL;
941     log_debug("Audio decoding disabled by user option");
942   }
943 
944   if (decoder->video_stream_idx < 0 && decoder->audio_stream_idx < 0) {
945     SET_ERRNO(ERROR_MEDIA_DECODE, "No video or audio streams found in stdin");
946     ffmpeg_decoder_destroy(decoder);
947     return NULL;
948   }
949 
950   // Allocate frame and packet
951   decoder->frame = av_frame_alloc();
952   decoder->packet = av_packet_alloc();
953   if (!decoder->frame || !decoder->packet) {
954     SET_ERRNO(ERROR_MEMORY, "Failed to allocate frame/packet");
955     ffmpeg_decoder_destroy(decoder);
956     return NULL;
957   }
958 
959   // Initialize swscale/swresample (same as file-based)
960   if (decoder->video_codec_ctx) {
961     // Validate codec context has valid dimensions and pixel format
962     // For stdin/HTTP streams, these might not be valid until first frame is read
963     if (decoder->video_codec_ctx->width <= 0 || decoder->video_codec_ctx->height <= 0) {
964       log_warn("Video codec has invalid dimensions (%dx%d), will initialize swscale on first frame",
965                decoder->video_codec_ctx->width, decoder->video_codec_ctx->height);
966       // Don't create swscale context yet - will create it lazily on first frame read
967     } else if (decoder->video_codec_ctx->pix_fmt == AV_PIX_FMT_NONE) {
968       log_warn("Video codec has invalid pixel format, will initialize swscale on first frame");
969       // Don't create swscale context yet - will create it lazily on first frame read
970     } else {
971       // Create swscale context with valid parameters
972       decoder->sws_ctx =
973           sws_getContext(decoder->video_codec_ctx->width, decoder->video_codec_ctx->height,
974                          decoder->video_codec_ctx->pix_fmt, decoder->video_codec_ctx->width,
975                          decoder->video_codec_ctx->height, AV_PIX_FMT_RGB24, SWS_BILINEAR, NULL, NULL, NULL);
976       if (!decoder->sws_ctx) {
977         SET_ERRNO(ERROR_MEDIA_DECODE, "Failed to create swscale context");
978         ffmpeg_decoder_destroy(decoder);
979         return NULL;
980       }
981     }
982   }
983 
984   if (decoder->audio_codec_ctx) {
985     decoder->swr_ctx = swr_alloc();
986     if (!decoder->swr_ctx) {
987       SET_ERRNO(ERROR_MEMORY, "Failed to allocate swresample context");
988       ffmpeg_decoder_destroy(decoder);
989       return NULL;
990     }
991 
992     av_opt_set_chlayout(decoder->swr_ctx, "in_chlayout", &decoder->audio_codec_ctx->ch_layout, 0);
993     av_opt_set_int(decoder->swr_ctx, "in_sample_rate", decoder->audio_codec_ctx->sample_rate, 0);
994     av_opt_set_sample_fmt(decoder->swr_ctx, "in_sample_fmt", decoder->audio_codec_ctx->sample_fmt, 0);
995 
996     AVChannelLayout out_ch_layout = AV_CHANNEL_LAYOUT_MONO;
997     av_opt_set_chlayout(decoder->swr_ctx, "out_chlayout", &out_ch_layout, 0);
998     av_opt_set_int(decoder->swr_ctx, "out_sample_rate", TARGET_SAMPLE_RATE, 0);
999     av_opt_set_sample_fmt(decoder->swr_ctx, "out_sample_fmt", AV_SAMPLE_FMT_FLT, 0);
1000 
1001     if (swr_init(decoder->swr_ctx) < 0) {
1002       SET_ERRNO(ERROR_MEDIA_DECODE, "Failed to initialize swresample context");
1003       ffmpeg_decoder_destroy(decoder);
1004       return NULL;
1005     }
1006 
1007     decoder->audio_buffer_size = TARGET_SAMPLE_RATE * 10;
1008     decoder->audio_buffer = SAFE_MALLOC(decoder->audio_buffer_size * sizeof(float), float *);
1009     if (!decoder->audio_buffer) {
1010       SET_ERRNO(ERROR_MEMORY, "Failed to allocate audio buffer");
1011       ffmpeg_decoder_destroy(decoder);
1012       return NULL;
1013     }
1014   }
1015 
1016   // Initialize video frame prefetching system for stdin (same as file-based)
1017   if (decoder->video_stream_idx >= 0) {
1018     int width = decoder->video_codec_ctx->width;
1019     int height = decoder->video_codec_ctx->height;
1020 
1021     // For stdin sources, dimensions might be invalid initially (0x0)
1022     // Use default dimensions for prefetch buffers; they'll be resized on first frame
1023     if (width <= 0 || height <= 0) {
1024       width = 1920;   // Default width for stdin
1025       height = 1080;  // Default height for stdin
1026       log_debug("stdin: Using default prefetch dimensions %dx%d (will be resized on first frame)", width, height);
1027     }
1028 
1029     // Create two prefetch image buffers for double-buffering
1030     decoder->prefetch_image_a = image_new((size_t)width, (size_t)height);
1031     decoder->prefetch_image_b = image_new((size_t)width, (size_t)height);
1032     if (!decoder->prefetch_image_a || !decoder->prefetch_image_b) {
1033       SET_ERRNO(ERROR_MEMORY, "Failed to allocate prefetch image buffers");
1034       ffmpeg_decoder_destroy(decoder);
1035       return NULL;
1036     }
1037 
1038     decoder->current_prefetch_image = decoder->prefetch_image_a;
1039     decoder->prefetch_frame_ready = false;
1040 
1041     // Initialize prefetch mutex
1042     if (mutex_init(&decoder->prefetch_mutex, "ffmpeg_prefetch") != 0) {
1043       SET_ERRNO(ERROR_MEMORY, "Failed to initialize prefetch mutex");
1044       ffmpeg_decoder_destroy(decoder);
1045       return NULL;
1046     }
1047 
1048     if (cond_init(&decoder->prefetch_cond, "ffmpeg_prefetch") != 0) {
1049       SET_ERRNO(ERROR_MEMORY, "Failed to initialize prefetch condition variable");
1050       mutex_destroy(&decoder->prefetch_mutex);
1051       ffmpeg_decoder_destroy(decoder);
1052       return NULL;
1053     }
1054 
1055     if (mutex_init(&decoder->read_frame_mutex, "ffmpeg_read_frame") != 0) {
1056       SET_ERRNO(ERROR_MEMORY, "Failed to initialize read_frame mutex");
1057       mutex_destroy(&decoder->prefetch_mutex);
1058       cond_destroy(&decoder->prefetch_cond);
1059       ffmpeg_decoder_destroy(decoder);
1060       return NULL;
1061     }
1062   }
1063 
1064   log_debug("FFmpeg decoder opened from stdin (video=%s, audio=%s)", decoder->video_stream_idx >= 0 ? "yes" : "no",
1065             decoder->audio_stream_idx >= 0 ? "yes" : "no");
1066 
1067   NAMED_REGISTER_FFMPEG_DECODER(decoder, "stdin", NULL);
1068 
1069   return decoder;
1070 }






References ffmpeg_decoder_t::audio_buffer,
    ffmpeg_decoder_t::audio_buffer_size,
    ffmpeg_decoder_t::audio_codec_ctx,
    ffmpeg_decoder_t::audio_stream_idx,
    ffmpeg_decoder_t::avio_buffer, AVIO_BUFFER_SIZE,
    ffmpeg_decoder_t::avio_ctx, stdin_buffer_reader_t::buffer,
    ffmpeg_decoder_t::current_prefetch_image,
    ffmpeg_decoder_destroy(), ffmpeg_decoder_t::format_ctx,
    ffmpeg_decoder_t::frame, image_new(),
    ffmpeg_decoder_t::is_stdin, ffmpeg_decoder_t::last_audio_pts,
    ffmpeg_decoder_t::last_video_pts, mutex_destroy(),
    mutex_init(), ffmpeg_decoder_t::packet,
    stdin_buffer_reader_t::pos, ffmpeg_decoder_t::prefetch_cond,
    ffmpeg_decoder_t::prefetch_frame_ready,
    ffmpeg_decoder_t::prefetch_image_a,
    ffmpeg_decoder_t::prefetch_image_b,
    ffmpeg_decoder_t::prefetch_mutex,
    ffmpeg_decoder_t::read_frame_mutex, ffmpeg_decoder_t::swr_ctx,

Referenced by media_source_create().






void
  ffmpeg_decoder_destroy (ffmpeg_decoder_t * decoder)


Definition at line 1072 of file
  ffmpeg_decoder.c.


1072                                                        {
1073   if (!decoder) {
1074     return;
1075   }
1076 
1077   NAMED_UNREGISTER(decoder);
1078 
1079   // Stop prefetch thread (signal it to stop and wait for it to finish)
1080   if (decoder->prefetch_thread_running) {
1081     mutex_lock(&decoder->prefetch_mutex);
1082     decoder->prefetch_should_stop = true;
1083     mutex_unlock(&decoder->prefetch_mutex);
1084 
1085     // Wait for thread to finish
1086     asciichat_thread_join(&decoder->prefetch_thread, NULL);
1087     decoder->prefetch_thread_running = false;
1088   }
1089 
1090   // Clean up prefetch state
1091   cond_destroy(&decoder->prefetch_cond);
1092   mutex_destroy(&decoder->prefetch_mutex);
1093   mutex_destroy(&decoder->read_frame_mutex);
1094 
1095   // Free prefetch image buffers
1096   if (decoder->prefetch_image_a) {
1097     image_destroy(decoder->prefetch_image_a);
1098     decoder->prefetch_image_a = NULL;
1099   }
1100   if (decoder->prefetch_image_b) {
1101     image_destroy(decoder->prefetch_image_b);
1102     decoder->prefetch_image_b = NULL;
1103   }
1104 
1105   // Don't destroy current_image - it points to one of the prefetch buffers
1106   // which have already been destroyed above
1107   decoder->current_image = NULL;
1108 
1109   // Free audio buffer
1110   SAFE_FREE(decoder->audio_buffer);
1111 
1112   // Free swscale context
1113   if (decoder->sws_ctx) {
1114     sws_freeContext(decoder->sws_ctx);
1115     decoder->sws_ctx = NULL;
1116   }
1117 
1118   // Free swresample context
1119   if (decoder->swr_ctx) {
1120     swr_free(&decoder->swr_ctx);
1121   }
1122 
1123   // Free frame and packet
1124   if (decoder->frame) {
1125     av_frame_free(&decoder->frame);
1126   }
1127   if (decoder->packet) {
1128     av_packet_free(&decoder->packet);
1129   }
1130 
1131   // Free codec contexts
1132   if (decoder->video_codec_ctx) {
1133     avcodec_free_context(&decoder->video_codec_ctx);
1134   }
1135   if (decoder->audio_codec_ctx) {
1136     avcodec_free_context(&decoder->audio_codec_ctx);
1137   }
1138 
1139   // Free format context
1140   if (decoder->format_ctx) {
1141     avformat_close_input(&decoder->format_ctx);
1142   }
1143 
1144   // Free AVIO context (stdin only)
1145   if (decoder->avio_ctx) {
1146     // Free the opaque reader for stdin
1147     if (decoder->is_stdin) {
1148       SAFE_FREE(decoder->avio_ctx->opaque);
1149     }
1150     av_freep(&decoder->avio_ctx->buffer);
1151     avio_context_free(&decoder->avio_ctx);
1152   }
1153 
1154   SAFE_FREE(decoder);
1155 }

double
  ffmpeg_decoder_get_duration (ffmpeg_decoder_t * decoder)


Definition at line 1548 of file
  ffmpeg_decoder.c.


1548                                                               {
1549   if (!decoder || !decoder->format_ctx) {
1550     return -1.0;
1551   }
1552 
1553   if (decoder->format_ctx->duration == AV_NOPTS_VALUE) {
1554     return -1.0;
1555   }
1556 
1557   return (double)decoder->format_ctx->duration / AV_TIME_BASE;
1558 }






References ffmpeg_decoder_t::format_ctx.


Referenced by media_source_get_duration().






double
  ffmpeg_decoder_get_position (ffmpeg_decoder_t * decoder)


Definition at line 1560 of file
  ffmpeg_decoder.c.


1560                                                               {
1561   if (!decoder) {
1562     return -1.0;
1563   }
1564 
1565   // Prefer sample-based position tracking (continuous, works before frames are decoded)
1566   if (decoder->audio_sample_rate > 0 && decoder->audio_samples_read >= 0) {
1567     return (double)decoder->audio_samples_read / (double)decoder->audio_sample_rate;
1568   }
1569 
1570   // Fallback to frame-based position if available
1571   if (decoder->last_video_pts >= 0.0) {
1572     return decoder->last_video_pts;
1573   } else if (decoder->last_audio_pts >= 0.0) {
1574     return decoder->last_audio_pts;
1575   }
1576 
1577   return -1.0;
1578 }

  ffmpeg_decoder_get_video_dimensions (ffmpeg_decoder_t * decoder, int *
  width, int * height)

  ffmpeg_decoder.c.


1282                                                                                                           {
1283   if (!decoder || decoder->video_stream_idx < 0) {
1284     return ERROR_INVALID_PARAM;
1285   }
1286 
1287   if (width) {
1288     *width = decoder->video_codec_ctx->width;

References ffmpeg_decoder_t::video_codec_ctx, and
    ffmpeg_decoder_t::video_stream_idx.






double
  ffmpeg_decoder_get_video_fps (ffmpeg_decoder_t * decoder)


Definition at line 1297 of file
  ffmpeg_decoder.c.


1297                                                                {
1298   if (!decoder || decoder->video_stream_idx < 0) {
1299     return -1.0;
1300   }
1301 
1302   AVStream *stream = decoder->format_ctx->streams[decoder->video_stream_idx];
1303 
1304   // Try avg_frame_rate first (average frame rate from entire stream)
1305   double fps = av_q2d_safe(stream->avg_frame_rate);
1306 
1307   // Fallback to r_frame_rate if avg_frame_rate is invalid or zero
1308   // r_frame_rate is the "real" frame rate based on codec parameters
1309   // This is more reliable for YouTube videos and some video codecs
1310   if (fps <= 0.0) {
1311     fps = av_q2d_safe(stream->r_frame_rate);
1312   }
1313 
1314   return fps;
1315 }

References ffmpeg_decoder_t::prefetch_thread_running.






size_t
  ffmpeg_decoder_read_audio_samples (ffmpeg_decoder_t * decoder, float *
  buffer, size_t num_samples)


Definition at line 1321 of file
  ffmpeg_decoder.c.


1321                                                                                                        {
1322   if (!decoder || decoder->audio_stream_idx < 0 || !buffer || num_samples == 0) {
1323     return 0;
1324   }
1325 
1326   size_t samples_written = 0;
1327 
1328   // First, drain any buffered samples
1329   if (decoder->audio_buffer_offset > 0) {
1330     size_t available = decoder->audio_buffer_offset;
1331     size_t to_copy = (available < num_samples) ? available : num_samples;
1332 
1333     memcpy(buffer, decoder->audio_buffer, to_copy * sizeof(float));
1334     samples_written += to_copy;
1335 
1336     // Shift buffer
1337     if (to_copy < available) {
1338       memmove(decoder->audio_buffer, decoder->audio_buffer + to_copy, (available - to_copy) * sizeof(float));
1339     }
1340     decoder->audio_buffer_offset -= to_copy;
1341 
1342     if (samples_written >= num_samples) {
1343       return samples_written;
1344     }
1345   }
1346 
1347   // Read more packets to fill the request
1348   static uint64_t packet_count = 0;
1349 
1350   // Lock read_frame_mutex to prevent concurrent av_read_frame() calls from video prefetch thread
1351   mutex_lock(&decoder->read_frame_mutex);
1352 
1353   while (samples_written < num_samples) {
1354     int ret = av_read_frame(decoder->format_ctx, decoder->packet);
1355     if (ret < 0) {
1356       if (ret == AVERROR_EOF) {
1357         decoder->eof_reached = true;
1358       }
1359       break;
1360     }
1361 
1362     // Check if this is an audio packet
1363     if (decoder->packet->stream_index != decoder->audio_stream_idx) {
1364       av_packet_unref(decoder->packet);
1365       continue;
1366     }
1367 
1368     log_info_every(50 * US_PER_MS_INT, "Audio packet #%lu: pts=%ld dts=%ld duration=%d size=%d", packet_count++,
1369                    decoder->packet->pts, decoder->packet->dts, decoder->packet->duration, decoder->packet->size);
1370 
1371     // Send packet to decoder
1372     ret = avcodec_send_packet(decoder->audio_codec_ctx, decoder->packet);
1373     av_packet_unref(decoder->packet);
1374 
1375     if (ret < 0) {
1376       log_warn("Error sending audio packet to decoder");
1377       continue;
1378     }
1379 
1380     // Receive all decoded frames from this packet
1381     // Important: a single packet can produce multiple frames. Must drain all before next packet.
1382     while (1) {
1383       ret = avcodec_receive_frame(decoder->audio_codec_ctx, decoder->frame);
1384       if (ret == AVERROR(EAGAIN)) {
1385         break; // No more frames from this packet, get next packet
1386       } else if (ret < 0) {
1387         log_warn("Error receiving audio frame from decoder");
1388         goto audio_read_done;
1389       }
1390 
1391       // Update position tracking
1392       decoder->last_audio_pts =
1393           get_frame_pts_seconds(decoder->frame, decoder->format_ctx->streams[decoder->audio_stream_idx]->time_base);
1394 
1395       // Resample to target format
1396       float *out_buf = buffer + samples_written;
1397       int out_samples = (int)(num_samples - samples_written);
1398 
1399       uint8_t *out_ptr = (uint8_t *)out_buf;
1400       int converted = swr_convert(decoder->swr_ctx, &out_ptr, out_samples, (const uint8_t **)decoder->frame->data,
1401                                   decoder->frame->nb_samples);
1402 
1403       if (converted > 0) {
1404         samples_written += (size_t)converted;
1405       }
1406 
1407       if (samples_written >= num_samples) {
1408         goto audio_read_done;
1409       }
1410     }
1411   }
1412 
1413 audio_read_done:
1414   // Release read_frame_mutex now that av_read_frame() is done
1415   mutex_unlock(&decoder->read_frame_mutex);
1416 
1417   // Flush resampler buffer if we haven't filled the full request
1418   // The resampler may have buffered samples that need to be output
1419   if (samples_written < num_samples) {
1420     int remaining_space = (int)(num_samples - samples_written);
1421     uint8_t *out_ptr = (uint8_t *)(buffer + samples_written);
1422     int flushed = swr_convert(decoder->swr_ctx, &out_ptr, remaining_space, NULL, 0);
1423     if (flushed > 0) {
1424       samples_written += (size_t)flushed;
1425     }
1426   }
1427 
1428   // Update sample-based position tracking
1429   decoder->audio_samples_read += samples_written;
1430 
1431   return samples_written;
1432 }






References ffmpeg_decoder_t::audio_buffer,
    ffmpeg_decoder_t::audio_buffer_offset,
    ffmpeg_decoder_t::audio_codec_ctx,
    ffmpeg_decoder_t::audio_samples_read,
    ffmpeg_decoder_t::audio_stream_idx,
    ffmpeg_decoder_t::eof_reached, ffmpeg_decoder_t::format_ctx,
    ffmpeg_decoder_t::frame, ffmpeg_decoder_t::last_audio_pts,
    ffmpeg_decoder_t::packet, ffmpeg_decoder_t::read_frame_mutex,
    and ffmpeg_decoder_t::swr_ctx.


Referenced by media_source_read_audio().






image_t
  * ffmpeg_decoder_read_video_frame (ffmpeg_decoder_t * decoder)


Definition at line 1161 of file
  ffmpeg_decoder.c.


1161                                                                     {
1162   if (!decoder || decoder->video_stream_idx < 0) {
1163     return NULL;
1164   }
1165 
1166   // Try to get a prefetched frame from the background thread (preferred path)
1167   mutex_lock(&decoder->prefetch_mutex);
1168   if (decoder->prefetch_frame_ready && decoder->current_prefetch_image) {
1169     // Release the previous buffer (rendering is now complete)
1170     if (decoder->current_read_buffer == decoder->prefetch_image_a) {
1171       decoder->buffer_a_in_use = false;
1172     } else if (decoder->current_read_buffer == decoder->prefetch_image_b) {
1173       decoder->buffer_b_in_use = false;
1174     }
1175 
1176     image_t *frame = decoder->current_prefetch_image;
1177     decoder->prefetch_frame_ready = false;
1178 
1179     // Mark the new buffer as in use (prevent prefetch thread from overwriting it during rendering)
1180     if (frame == decoder->prefetch_image_a) {
1181       decoder->buffer_a_in_use = true;
1182     } else if (frame == decoder->prefetch_image_b) {
1183       decoder->buffer_b_in_use = true;
1184     }
1185 
1186     decoder->current_read_buffer = frame;
1187     mutex_unlock(&decoder->prefetch_mutex);
1188 
1189     // Use the prefetched frame
1190     decoder->current_image = frame;
1191     log_dev_every(5 * US_PER_SEC_INT, "Using prefetched frame");
1192     return frame;
1193   }
1194   mutex_unlock(&decoder->prefetch_mutex);
1195 
1196   // No fallback synchronous decode - rely on background prefetch thread
1197   // Skipping frames when prefetch not ready allows audio timing to advance
1198   // This is critical for proper audio-video sync when prefetch is active
1199   log_dev_every(5 * US_PER_SEC_INT,
1200                 "Prefetch frame not ready, skipping to next iteration (allow prefetch to catch up)");
1201   return NULL;
1202 }






References ffmpeg_decoder_t::buffer_a_in_use,
    ffmpeg_decoder_t::buffer_b_in_use,
    ffmpeg_decoder_t::current_image,
    ffmpeg_decoder_t::current_prefetch_image,
    ffmpeg_decoder_t::current_read_buffer, frame,
    ffmpeg_decoder_t::prefetch_frame_ready,
    ffmpeg_decoder_t::prefetch_image_a,
    ffmpeg_decoder_t::prefetch_image_b,
    ffmpeg_decoder_t::prefetch_mutex, and
    ffmpeg_decoder_t::video_stream_idx.


Referenced by media_source_read_video().






asciichat_error_t
  ffmpeg_decoder_rewind (ffmpeg_decoder_t * decoder)


Definition at line 1442 of file
  ffmpeg_decoder.c.


1442                                                                    {
1443   if (!decoder) {
1444     return ERROR_INVALID_PARAM;
1445   }
1446 
1447   if (decoder->is_stdin) {
1448     return ERROR_NOT_SUPPORTED; // Cannot seek stdin
1449   }
1450 
1451   // Flush codec buffers
1452   if (decoder->video_codec_ctx) {
1453     avcodec_flush_buffers(decoder->video_codec_ctx);
1454   }
1455   if (decoder->audio_codec_ctx) {
1456     avcodec_flush_buffers(decoder->audio_codec_ctx);
1457   }
1458 
1459   // Seek to beginning
1460   if (av_seek_frame(decoder->format_ctx, -1, 0, AVSEEK_FLAG_BACKWARD) < 0) {
1461     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_MEDIA_SEEK, "Failed to seek to beginning");
1462   }
1463 
1464   decoder->eof_reached = false;
1465   decoder->audio_buffer_offset = 0;
1466   decoder->last_video_pts = -1.0;
1467   decoder->last_audio_pts = -1.0;
1468   decoder->audio_samples_read = 0; // Reset sample counter to 0
1469 
1470   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
1471 }






References ffmpeg_decoder_t::audio_buffer_offset,
    ffmpeg_decoder_t::audio_codec_ctx,
    ffmpeg_decoder_t::audio_samples_read,
    ffmpeg_decoder_t::eof_reached, ffmpeg_decoder_t::format_ctx,
    ffmpeg_decoder_t::is_stdin, ffmpeg_decoder_t::last_audio_pts,
    ffmpeg_decoder_t::last_video_pts, and
    ffmpeg_decoder_t::video_codec_ctx.


Referenced by media_source_rewind().






asciichat_error_t
  ffmpeg_decoder_seek_to_timestamp (ffmpeg_decoder_t * decoder, double
  timestamp_sec)


Definition at line 1473 of file
  ffmpeg_decoder.c.


1473                                                                                                     {
1474   if (!decoder) {
1475     return ERROR_INVALID_PARAM;
1476   }
1477 
1478   if (decoder->is_stdin) {
1479     return ERROR_NOT_SUPPORTED; // Cannot seek stdin
1480   }
1481 
1482   // Hold mutex during entire seek operation to prevent race with prefetch thread
1483   mutex_lock(&decoder->prefetch_mutex);
1484 
1485   // Set flag to pause prefetch thread via condition variable
1486   decoder->seeking_in_progress = true;
1487 
1488   // Convert seconds to FFmpeg time base units (AV_TIME_BASE = 1,000,000)
1489   int64_t target_ts = (int64_t)(timestamp_sec * AV_TIME_BASE);
1490 
1491   // For HTTP streams, use simple keyframe seeking (faster than frame-accurate seeking)
1492   // HTTP seeking is expensive and can break stream state, so prefer speed over precision
1493   int seek_ret = av_seek_frame(decoder->format_ctx, -1, target_ts, AVSEEK_FLAG_BACKWARD);
1494   if (seek_ret < 0) {
1495     // Fallback: try without backward flag
1496     seek_ret = av_seek_frame(decoder->format_ctx, -1, target_ts, 0);
1497   }
1498 
1499   if (seek_ret < 0) {
1500     decoder->seeking_in_progress = false;
1501     cond_signal(&decoder->prefetch_cond);
1502     mutex_unlock(&decoder->prefetch_mutex);
1503     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_MEDIA_SEEK, "Failed to seek to timestamp %.2f seconds", timestamp_sec);
1504   }
1505 
1506   // Flush codec buffers AFTER seeking
1507   if (decoder->video_codec_ctx) {
1508     avcodec_flush_buffers(decoder->video_codec_ctx);
1509   }
1510   if (decoder->audio_codec_ctx) {
1511     avcodec_flush_buffers(decoder->audio_codec_ctx);
1512   }
1513 
1514   // Reset state
1515   decoder->eof_reached = false;
1516   decoder->audio_buffer_offset = 0;
1517   // Clear any stale audio data in buffer
1518   if (decoder->audio_buffer) {
1519     memset(decoder->audio_buffer, 0, decoder->audio_buffer_size * sizeof(float));
1520   }
1521   decoder->last_video_pts = -1.0;
1522   decoder->last_audio_pts = -1.0;
1523   decoder->prefetch_frame_ready = false;
1524   // Set audio_samples_read to match the seek target so position tracking works correctly
1525   decoder->audio_samples_read = (uint64_t)(timestamp_sec * decoder->audio_sample_rate);
1526 
1527   // Reset current_read_buffer and mark both buffers as not in use
1528   // After seeking, the prefetch thread may reallocate buffers, so current_read_buffer
1529   // could point to freed memory. Clear it so the next read doesn't try to release stale pointers.
1530   decoder->current_read_buffer = NULL;
1531   decoder->buffer_a_in_use = false;
1532   decoder->buffer_b_in_use = false;
1533 
1534   // Resume prefetch thread
1535   decoder->seeking_in_progress = false;
1536   cond_signal(&decoder->prefetch_cond);
1537 
1538   // Release mutex - prefetch thread can resume
1539   mutex_unlock(&decoder->prefetch_mutex);
1540 
1541   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
1542 }

  ffmpeg_decoder_set_exit_callback (ffmpeg_decoder_t * decoder,
  bool(* should_exit_callback )(void *), void * user_data)


Definition at line 1262 of file
  ffmpeg_decoder.c.

1264   if (!decoder) {
1265     return;
1266   }

asciichat_error_t
  ffmpeg_decoder_start_prefetch (ffmpeg_decoder_t * decoder)


Start the background frame prefetching thread. Starts a background
    thread that continuously reads and decodes video frames, storing them in
    double-buffer structures. The render loop pulls frames from these buffers.
    This prevents the render thread from blocking on YouTube HTTP requests.


Definition at line 1211 of file
  ffmpeg_decoder.c.


1211                                                                            {
1212   if (!decoder || decoder->video_stream_idx < 0) {
1213     return ERROR_INVALID_PARAM;
1214   }
1215 
1216   if (!decoder->prefetch_image_a || !decoder->prefetch_image_b) {
1217     return ERROR_INVALID_PARAM;
1218   }
1219 
1220   // Already running
1221   if (decoder->prefetch_thread_running) {
1222     return ASCIICHAT_OK;
1223   }
1224 
1225   // Reset stop flag and create thread
1226   decoder->prefetch_should_stop = false;
1227 
1228   int thread_err = asciichat_thread_create(&decoder->prefetch_thread, "ffmpeg_prefetch",
1229                                            ffmpeg_decoder_prefetch_thread_func, decoder);
1230   if (thread_err != 0) {
1231     return SET_ERRNO(ERROR_THREAD, "Failed to create video prefetch thread");
1232   }
1233 
1234   decoder->prefetch_thread_running = true;
1235   return ASCIICHAT_OK;
1236 }






References asciichat_thread_create(),
    ffmpeg_decoder_t::prefetch_image_a,
    ffmpeg_decoder_t::prefetch_image_b,
    ffmpeg_decoder_t::prefetch_should_stop,
    ffmpeg_decoder_t::prefetch_thread,
    ffmpeg_decoder_t::prefetch_thread_running, and
    ffmpeg_decoder_t::video_stream_idx.


Referenced by media_source_create().






void
  ffmpeg_decoder_stop_prefetch (ffmpeg_decoder_t * decoder)


Stop the background frame prefetching thread.


Definition at line 1241 of file
  ffmpeg_decoder.c.


1241                                                              {
1242   if (!decoder || !decoder->prefetch_thread_running) {
1243     return;
1244   }
1245 
1246   decoder->prefetch_should_stop = true;
1247   // Wait up to 2 seconds for thread to stop
1248   // The interrupt callback should cause av_read_frame to abort quickly
1249   int join_result = asciichat_thread_join_timeout(&decoder->prefetch_thread, NULL, 2000 * NS_PER_MS_INT);
1250 
1251   if (join_result == 0) {
1252     // Thread exited successfully
1253     decoder->prefetch_thread_running = false;
1254   } else {
1255     // Timeout: thread is still running (blocked on I/O)
1256     // Mark as stopped anyway - we'll create a new thread on restart
1257     // The old thread will eventually finish and exit
1258     decoder->prefetch_thread_running = false;
1259   }
1260 }






References ffmpeg_decoder_t::prefetch_should_stop,
    ffmpeg_decoder_t::prefetch_thread, and
    ffmpeg_decoder_t::prefetch_thread_running.
